title: LangGraph Concepts
snippet: LangGraph is a framework for building stateful, multi-actor applications with LLMs. It provides graphs with nodes, edges, state, and control flow for complex agent workflows.

title: Anthropic: Building effective agents
snippet: Guidance on designing effective AI agents: decomposition, tool use, planning, reflection, guardrails, evaluations, and failure modes.

title: OpenAI: Agents orchestration and handoffs
snippet: Overview of orchestrating multiple agents and implementing handoffs. Discusses routing, tool calls, structured state, and managing cost/latency.

title: RAG overview (general)
snippet: Retrieval-Augmented Generation combines retrieval from external documents with generative models to ground responses, improve factuality, and provide citations.

title: GraphRAG overview (general)
snippet: GraphRAG extends RAG by organizing knowledge as graphs of entities and relations, enabling retrieval that leverages neighborhoods, paths, and structured context.
